VCCP_fixed_4S.parameter: Periphery supply voltage for I/O banks

VCCP_fixed_5S.parameter: Periphery supply voltage for I/O banks

VCCP_fixed_6S_6X.parameter: Periphery supply voltage for I/O banks

VCCP_smartvid.parameter: Periphery supply voltage for I/O banks

VCCH_SDM_with_transceiver.parameter: SDM block AIB I/O supply voltage sense

VCCPT.parameter: Power supply for I/O, DTS, SDM, and system PLL

VCCRCORE.parameter: Power supply for programmable power technology

VCCBAT.parameter: Battery backup power supply for design security volatile key register

VCCIO_PIO_SDM_1V2.parameter: SDM block I/O supply voltage sense of bank 3A
VCCIO_PIO_SDM_1V2.conditions: 1.2 V; required for Avalon Streaming x16 configuration schemes

VCCIO_SDM.parameter: SDM block configuration pins power supply

VCCPLL_SDM.parameter: SDM block PLL analog power supply

VCC_HSSI_6S_6X.parameter: Transceiver, system PLL, and hard IP digital power supply

VCC_HSSI_5S.parameter: Transceiver, system PLL, and hard IP digital power supply

VCC_HSSI_1V_2V_2E_3V_4S.parameter: Transceiver, system PLL, and hard IP digital power supply

VCCEHT_GTS.parameter: Transceiver PMA, PLL, and reference clock high-voltage analog power supply

VCCERT_GTS.parameter: Transceiver PMA and reference clock low-voltage analog power supply

power_integrity.desc: All power and ground pins must be connected.

configuration_pins.desc: Configuration and SDM pins must be wired per the selected boot scheme.

serdes_refclk.desc: Refclk pair selection and quad mapping must match the chosen transceiver usage.

agilex5_power_monotonic_ramp.desc: All Agilex 5 power supply ramps must be strictly monotonic without plateaus; AS fast mode requires all supplies fully ramped within 10 ms.

agilex5_io_bank_voltage_selection.desc: Each HSIO/HVIO/HPS/SDM bank voltage must match every assigned I/O standard in that bank or sub-bank.

agilex5_configuration_clock.desc: OSC_CLK_1 must use one of the supported external configuration clock frequencies and match the Quartus configuration clock source assignment.

agilex5_pin_connection_guidelines.desc: Run the official Agilex 5 Pin Connection Guidelines checklist for dedicated pins, NC/DNU handling, and rail sharing before schematic sign-off.

agilex5_gts_transceiver_power_noise.desc: GTS transceiver analog and digital rails have VR accuracy, ripple, transient, and HF-noise requirements that must be checked against the PDN design.

package_pinout.source_revision_note:
Updated soft CDR support column:
-Added CDR support on pin index 0, 1, 12, 13, 24, 25, 36, and 37.
-Removed CDR support on pin index 10, 11, 22, 23, 34, 35, 46, and 47.

device_datasheet.scope: electrical, I/O, power, and configuration constraints

pin_connection_guidelines.source_note: The official Agilex 5 pinout workbooks reference the Pin Connection Guidelines for pin definition and connection guidance; this repository has not yet parsed that guide into structured rules.
pin_connection_guidelines.scope: manual schematic checklist until structured parsing is added

high_speed_serial.review_note: Agilex 5 transceiver protocol/IP enablement still depends on the selected ordering code, package migration limits, and design-specific quad usage.

PCIe 4.0.note: PCI Express reference clocks are typically implemented as 100 MHz differential HCSL or translated equivalents.

10G Ethernet.note: 10G serial Ethernet families commonly use a 156.25 MHz differential reference clock.

refclk_requirements.selection_note: Refclk frequency, clock standard, jitter budget, and pair-to-quad mapping must be frozen against the selected protocol before schematic sign-off.

lane_group_mappings.selection_note: Freeze the protocol/IP assignment for this lane group and bind it to one of the mapped refclk pairs before schematic sign-off.
Freeze the protocol/IP assignment for this lane group and bind it to one of the mapped refclk pairs before schematic sign-off.
Freeze the protocol/IP assignment for this lane group and bind it to one of the mapped refclk pairs before schematic sign-off.

refclk_requirements.review_note: Agilex 5 transceiver protocol/IP enablement still depends on the selected ordering code, package migration limits, and design-specific quad usage.

smartvid.review_note: SmartVID rails require a PMBus voltage regulator connected to the device; static export does not replace Quartus/PTC power planning.

io_bank_voltage_selection.sub_bank_rule: Each HSIO sub-bank can support only a single VCCIO_PIO voltage tolerance; verify the selected I/O standards per sub-bank before schematic sign-off.

pin_connection_guidelines_review.source_note: The official Agilex 5 pinout workbooks reference the Pin Connection Guidelines for pin definition and connection guidance; this repository has not yet parsed that guide into structured rules.
checklist_topics: Clock and PLL pin connection rules
Dedicated configuration and JTAG pull-up/pull-down rules
Core, SDM, GTS, and HPS power pin connection rules

gts_transceiver_power_integrity.measurement_note: Use a 20 MHz bandwidth for scope measurement and place the ground pin as close to the power rail pin as possible.
